final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photo of a classical Chinese beauty in exquisite Hanfu seated on a wooden pavilion in a Jiangnan water town.

Style/medium: Chinese traditional painting fusion — meticulous gongbi brushwork detail meets freehand xieyi poetic atmosphere, photorealistic rendering with painterly texture
Composition: centered symmetrical framing, medium shot capturing figure and pavilion, eye-level perspective with subtle depth layering
Subject: elegant woman in refined Hanfu with pale cyan silk and gold embroidery, elaborate updo adorned with jade hairpins and pearl ornaments, holding a round silk fan, turning head to gaze into the distance with delicate classical makeup
Scene/backdrop: Jiangnan water town wooden pavilion, lotus pond with blooming pink-white flowers swaying in breeze, crystal water droplets on lotus leaves, Hui-style architecture with white walls and black tiles in background, winding bluestone paths, white egrets flying low over water
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, gentle morning atmosphere, serene and poetic Eastern aesthetic mood
Color palette: pale cyan and gold as dominant, soft pink-white lotus accents, muted greens of lotus leaves, warm wood tones of pavilion, overall elegant and restrained palette
Materials/textures: flowing silk fabric with visible embroidery threads, smooth jade and lustrous pearls, weathered wood grain of pavilion, waxy lotus petals with dewdrops
Avoid: plastic-looking fabrics, oversaturated colors, deformed hands, modern elements, 8K stuffer aesthetic, western architectural details
